title: Flashy 32x
description:
This pack is a fork of the original Flashy 32x for 1.8.9. 
This pack includes vibrant armor, smaller swords, smooth blocks, and 32x textures for items.
body:
# **What This Pack Adds**
Low Fire, 
Smooth Blocks, 
Better Armor Textures, 
32x Old Textures for Items, 
Better Crit and Enchanted Hit Particles, 
Clear GUI

# **This Pack Is Made For 1.21.11, 26.1, And 26.1.1.**

# **Q&A**
## Will this pack affect my performace?
  _No, this pack should not affect your performace ingame._
## Will this work with my other texturepacks?
  _Yes, as long as you have it on top of your other packs, it should work fine._
## Do I need any mods to have the pack work correctly?
  _You don't need any mods to make the texturepack work._
